markdown:
#  Export a Submittal Package 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permisisons or higher on the project's Submittals tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool.
  2. Click the **Packages** tab.
  3. Click **View** next to the submittal package you want to export.
  4. Click **Export** and select **PDF**.  
A PDF with a summary of the submittal package and its submittals is downloaded to your computer.


## See Also
  * [Best Practices: Submittal Packages - Submittal Itemization](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-best-practices-submittal-packages-submittal-itemization)
  * [Best Practices: Submittal Packages - Creation and Review](https://v2.support.procore.com/reference-best-practices-submittal-packages-creation-and-review)
  * [Resend the Submittals in a Package for Review](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/resend-the-submittals-in-a-package-for-review)
title: Export a Submittal Package
description: How to export a submittal package.
